vocab.example: I usually gravitate towards a secluded alcove in the university library where foot traffic is minimal.

vocab.meaning: có lợi cho, tạo điều kiện thuận lợi cho
vocab.example: The minimalist decor of my home office is highly conducive to deep work and creative thinking.

vocab.meaning: tiếng ồn xung quanh (thường là âm thanh nền nhẹ)
vocab.example: I find that a moderate level of ambient noise in a coffee shop actually helps me focus better than total silence.

vocab.meaning: trạm làm việc/góc học tập được thiết kế chuẩn nhân trắc học
vocab.example: I invested in an ergonomic workstation to prevent physical strain during long hours of exam preparation.

vocab.meaning: nơi trú ẩn, nơi yên tĩnh an toàn
vocab.example: My local public library is a sanctuary for me, especially when my dormitory becomes too boisterous.
To achieve optimal productivity, I prefer studying in environments with plenty of natural light and ventilation.

vocab.meaning: không để ý xung quanh, tập trung hoàn toàn vào việc mình làm
vocab.example: Once I put on my headphones at the park, I can completely zone out and absorb my textbooks.

vocab.meaning: gọn gàng, không có đồ đạc bừa bãi
vocab.example: I always ensure my desk is clutter-free before I start studying, as a messy environment leads to a messy mind.
Sometimes I head to the communal study area in the student union to feed off the collective focus of my peers.

vocab.meaning: những yếu tố gây xao nhãng từ thiết bị điện tử
vocab.example: I choose to study in locations where I am less tempted by digital distractions, often leaving my phone in another room.
